Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 6th, 2009 (Wide) by Overture Films
Video Release: March 23rd, 2010 by Overture Films/Anchor Bay
MPA Rating: R For language, some drug content and brief nudity
Running Time: 94 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Intertitle, Prologue
